description: The TouchValueOption component allows you to set a field to a value on press, it can drive indicators for Active and Hovering.

fields.ActiveIndicator: The field to drive with whether T in ``Target`` equals ``Value``.
fields.HoverIndicator: The field to drive with whether this button is being hovered over via laser.
fields.HoverVibrate: How to vibrate haptics on the hand that is hovering over this option.
fields.Vibrate: How to vibrate haptics on the hand that is pressing this option.
fields.SetOnTouchBegin: Whether to set the T in ``Target`` to ``Value`` upon start touching this component.
fields.SetOnTouchStay: Whether to set the T in ``Target`` to ``Value`` every frame while keeping touching this component.
fields.SetOnTouchEnd: Whether to set the T in ``Target`` to ``Value`` upon end touching this component.
fields.EditModeOnly: Whether this component can only be interacted with if the user is in edit mode.
fields.ActiveUserRootOnly: Whether only the active user of this component can interact with this component.

usage: Needs a static collider on the same slot in order to work. Attach to said slot and provide a field for it to set in ``Target``.
